---
title: Alpha
---

Inline math $E = mc^2$ sits in prose, and prices like $5 or $10 are left
alone. A claim can carry a sidenote.[^why]

[^why]: Because $c^2$ is enormous, a gram of mass hides $9\times10^{13}$
  joules. See [energy](../vocab/energy.md).

Display math gets its own block:

$$
\oint_{\partial\Sigma} \mathbf{B}\cdot d\boldsymbol{\ell} = \mu_0 I
$$

External links [pass through](https://example.org/page) untouched.
